case_title: HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION vs. RIVERS, ERVIN E. et al

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION III, AS ASSIGNEE OF ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERS, ERVIN E. DOES I THROUGH V SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-12-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-11-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-22-1994
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION III, AS ASSIGNEE OF ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION III, AS ASSIGNEE OF ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES SERVED AUG-18-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERS, ERVIN E.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION III, AS ASSIGNEE OF ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERS, ERVIN E. $2,168.97 PRINCIPAL, $60.31 INTEREST, $192.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,421.78, STIPULATED--SEE JUDGMENT ON FILE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: STEIN, BRIAN DOUGLAS SUBSTITUTED FOR MICKLAS, M JEFFREY AS ATTORNEY FOR HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION III, AS ASSIGNEE OF ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION III, AS ASSIGNEE OF ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERS, ERVIN E.
